headline: WIP Aging for huggingface/transformers as of May 12, 2026: 1000 in-flight items, 933 already past P85 (13.9d), 860 past P95 (36.5d).
definition: Aging Work In Progress chart per Vacanti (WWIBD pp. 50-51). Each dot is one in-flight item, placed in the column of its current workflow state at a height equal to its Age (days since entering the workflow). Percentile lines come from the cycle times of recently completed items — read horizontally as risk thresholds: an item aging past P85 likely misses its forecast.
key_insight: 933 item(s) have aged past the P85 cycle time (13.9d) — Vacanti's threshold for likely forecast miss. Oldest: #35517, #35535, #35550. Concentrate decision-making here.
next_actions: 860 item(s) past P95 (36.5d): decide explicitly to expedite, split, or drop. They are now outliers in your own historical distribution.
Biggest WIP column is 'Awaiting Review' with 719 item(s). If that band is upstream (queue), pull policy. If downstream (review/test), capacity.
Re-check daily; Aging is a leading indicator of forecast slip.
caveats: Aging is a snapshot as of May 12, 2026 — not a trend over time.
Percentile lines reflect the completed-item distribution from Apr 12, 2026 → May 11, 2026 (241 items). If recent throughput has changed, those checkpoints may have drifted.
Items in early workflow states (Open, To Do) often age longest in OSS — that's queue, not work. Treat the chart as a queue-depth indicator first, a productivity signal second.

vocabulary.Work Item Age: Elapsed time since an item entered the workflow. Applies only to in-flight items — once an item exits, that elapsed time becomes the item's Cycle Time. Vacanti, WWIBD pp. 50.
vocabulary.In-flight items: Items that have entered but not exited the workflow. Each in-flight item is one dot on the Aging chart, in the column of its current state.
vocabulary.Cycle time percentile lines: Reference checkpoints drawn from the cycle times of recently completed items. If an in-flight item ages past P85, it's likely to miss its forecast — actionable evidence to intervene.
vocabulary.Aging chart: Plots in-flight items by current workflow state (x) and Age in days (y). Vacanti, WWIBD Figure 3.2.
